sections.paragraph:
ἐρώτησις, εως, ἡ (=‘question’ Hippocr. et al.; OGI 508, 10; PSI X, 1179, 48 [II/III a.d., lit.]; En; ParJer 4:4f cod. C; Philo, Rer. Div. Her. 18; Just., A II, 3, 4ff) request (so prob. Syntipas 105, 30) of a prayer Hv 3, 10, 6. S. prec. entry.—DELG s.v. ἐρέω.

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

En En = I Enoch—List 2

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

prob. prob. = probable, probably

Syntipas Syntipas , a collection of fables under the name of Syntapis; before XI a.d.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

prec. prec. = preceding

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 395
